summary: Applied 9 of 16 JUDGE iter-1 suggestions: 3/4 HIGH, 5/7 MEDIUM, 1/5 LOW. Added 4 nodes (GID1, TIR1, NCED1, HOX12), removed 8 edges, added 13 edges. Network grew 65->69 nodes, 94->99 edges. Source percentage 43.1%->39.1% (within 30-50% target). All 5 QA checks pass. TB1 input count reduced from 8 to 7 via S003 routing. Tiller_Number reduced from 8 to 7 via S005. Cytokinin->TB1 bypass KEPT as TRAP 5 documented framework limitation (revised from JUDGE S002 remove-recommendation).

changes: Added node GID1 (GENE, is_source=false, input from Gibberellin)
Removed edge Gibberellin->SLR1(-1) [N026]
Removed edge Gibberellin->NGR5(-1) [N027]
Added edge Gibberellin->GID1(+1) [N095] - Ueguchi-Tanaka 2005
Added edge GID1->SLR1(-1) [N096] - Ueguchi-Tanaka 2005 (E135)
Added edge GID1->NGR5(-1) [N097] - Wu 2020 Science (E136)
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: Gibberellin now has single outgoing edge (GID1) restoring Perception Gate purity. gid1 + GA rescue tests will correctly fail (TIR1-analogue receptor KO blocks signalling).

changes: KEPT edge Cytokinin->TB1(-1) as biologically required
UPDATED mechanism field documenting TRAP 5 framework limitation
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: BUILDER judgment: cannot remove CK->TB1 direct because the existing HK4->AHP->RR21->IPA1->TB1 phosphorelay cascade carries POSITIVE net sign (all intermediate edges sign=+1), but biology requires CK to REPRESS TB1 (CK promotes tillering). Removing the direct edge would invert the CK-TB1 relationship and break all WT CK-addition and gn1a mutant predictions. The tradeoff is a framework limitation: hk4-KO + exogenous-trans-zeatin will still produce spurious TB1 repression through the direct edge (TRAP 5). Documented in mechanism field per BUILDER §14 Trap 5.

changes: Added node TIR1 (GENE, is_source=false, input from Auxin; renamed from OsTIR1 per GENE ALL_CAPS naming rule)
Removed edges Auxin->D10(+1) [N017], Auxin->D17(+1) [N018], Auxin->IPT(-1) [N040], Auxin->TB1(+1) [N049]
Added edge Auxin->TIR1(+1) [N098] - Chandran 2025 (E063)
Added edge TIR1->D10(+1) [N099] - summary through OsARF transcription
Added edge TIR1->D17(+1) [N100] - summary through OsARF transcription
Added edge TIR1->IPT(-1) [N101] - summary through OsARF transcription

NOT added TIR1->TB1: deliberately excluded to reduce TB1 input count from 8 to 7 (cap compliance); Auxin's tillering effect now propagates through cascades TIR1->D10/D17->SL->D14->D53->IPA1->TB1 and TIR1->IPT->CK->TB1
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: Auxin now has single outgoing edge (TIR1) restoring Perception Gate purity. tir1 mutants and IAA rescue tests will correctly respect receptor gating. Multi-output scaffold TIR1->{D10,D17,IPT} captures pleiotropic auxin signalling (Motif 5).

changes: TB1 input count reduced from 8 to 7 via S003 (Auxin->TB1 removed, not replaced with TIR1->TB1)
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: Resolved as side-effect of S003. TB1 now has 2 activators (IPA1, CCA1) and 5 inhibitors (NGR5, Cytokinin, BZR1, T6P, VIL2) = 7 total, at the upper bound but within per-category cap.

changes: Removed edge MOC1->Tiller_Number(+1) [N022]
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: MOC1 signal now propagates to TN via two parallel cascades: MOC1->LAX1->TN and MOC1->MOC3->FON1->TN (Motif 3 coherent feed-forward preserved). TN input count reduced from 8 to 7 (4 activators DLT, PIN9, LAX1, FON1; 3 inhibitors TB1, PIN1B, ABA).

changes: Added node HOX12 (GENE, is_source=true; renamed from OsHOX12 per ALL_CAPS rule)
Added node NCED1 (GENE, is_source=false, input from HOX12)
Added edge HOX12->NCED1(+1) [N105] - Wei 2020 Molecular Plant (E158)
Added edge NCED1->ABA(+1) [N106] - Wei 2020 Molecular Plant (E091)
NOT added E157 Strigolactone->HOX12 to preserve SL Perception Gate purity (SL has single outgoing edge to D14 only)
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: ABA biosynthesis arm established (HOX12->NCED1->ABA->Tiller_Number(-1)). ABA now has one proper upstream activator (NCED1) plus existing T20 parallel path. HOX12 retained as source node with literature_gap flag; upstream D53-mediated HOX12 derepression (the biologically correct route that would preserve Perception Gate) is not curated.

changes: NO changes - MOC3 annotation already documents MOC3 as MOC3/OsWUS/TAB1 alias (node_annotations.json confirms full_name = 'MOC3 / OsWUS / TAB1')
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: Verified via node_annotations.json: MOC3 is already the TAB1/OsWUS ortholog in this network. The JUDGE flagged this as a MEDIUM priority based on possible naming ambiguity. No node addition or renaming needed. Curated edges E079 (TAB1->TN summary) and E081 (FON2->TAB1) map correctly to MOC3; E081 FON2->MOC3 is already in the network as N060.

changes: Updated PIN1B description in node_annotations.json
Added composite_members: ['OsPIN1a', 'OsPIN1b'] to PIN1B annotation
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: Composite documentation per §9.3. Curated edges E011 and E058 (OsPIN1b) and E057 (OsPIN1a) all map to the single PIN1B node; composite reflects functional redundancy of the two paralogs for polar auxin transport.

changes: Removed edge Cytokinin->RR_TYPEA(+1) [N083]
Added edge AHP->RR_TYPEA(+1) [N102] - Tsai 2012 Plant Physiology
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: Type-A RRs are phosphorelay primary-response genes induced by the HK->AHP->RR-B cascade, not directly by CK ligand. Rewiring restores canonical CK-signalling topology. Does not break any existing cascade path because RR_TYPEA still has its outgoing RR_TYPEA->Cytokinin(-1) feedback edge intact.

changes: Added edge IPA1->LOG(+1) [N103] - Lu 2013 Plant Cell (E010)
Added edge IPA1->HK4(+1) [N104] - Chun 2023 Plant Cell (E012)
LOG converted from is_source=true to is_source=false (now has activator IPA1)
HK4 gains second activator (in addition to Cytokinin)
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: Captures IPA1-mediated positive feedback on CK signalling (IPA1->HK4 receptor activation) and CK activation (IPA1->LOG). Improves the 'panicle vs tiller' IPA1 function: IPA1 GOF increases CK via LOG activation (panicle-architecture effect) while IPA1 GOF also raises TB1 (tiller-repression effect via IPA1->TB1(+1)).
JUDGE recommended Option A (keep CKX2 and CKX9 separate). BUILDER agrees: DST->CKX2 and D53->CKX9 represent mechanistically distinct regulation arms; collapsing them would lose specificity.

BUILDER judgment: adding TPL as parallel arm D53->TPL->IPA1(-) would not add predictive power because bounded-inverse inhibition already saturates at the 10x cap from the existing D53->IPA1(-1) direct edge in d53-KO conditions. TPL would be mechanism-depth decoration without model behaviour change. JUDGE S012 was LOW priority; deferred as unnecessary overhead.

changes: Added edge ABA->D10(-1) [N107] - Wei 2020 Molecular Plant (E159)
suggestion_outcomes.rationale: Completes ABA-SL negative feedback. ABA now has 2 outgoing edges (TN-1, D10-1), capturing both direct tillering inhibition and indirect SL-biosynthesis repression arms.

Redundant with miR156 already in network. Adding miR529 as separate node would inflate node count without adding predictive differentiation (single-KO of either paralog alone rarely produces phenotype).
Flagged as literature_gap for future Step 1.5 re-mining. BUILDER cannot add edges without DOI evidence in curated_edges.json.
Flagged as literature_gap. Current cascade D53->IPA1->TB1 carries correct sign via IPA1.

perception_gates_preexisting: SL via D14 (+D3 co-inhibition of D53)

check_network_structure.is_source_flag: PASS (all flags consistent with edge structure)
